[gal][tx|欢迎使用纯净模板。这是一个室内的暖色调场景...][bg|bg-room][tx|看，这是一个使用粉色色块模拟的笑脸角色占位。][sp|测试员A][ch|sp-girl-smile][sd|center-left][ac|1][tx|是的。而我是一个蓝色调色块模拟的悲伤角色。][sp|测试员B][ch|sp-girl-sad][sd|center-right][ac|1][tx|背景也可以瞬间切换到冷色调街道！][bg|bg-street][sp|测试员A][ch|sp-girl-smile][sd|center-left][ac|1]

Dialogue History

Coffee & Stars

咖啡与星语

<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Serif+SC:wght@300;400;600&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400&family=Ma+Shan+Zheng&display=swap');

/* 自定义区：背景与立绘 */
.bg-room   { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #d4b895 0%, #8b6b4a 100%); }
.bg-street { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2b4162 0%, #10101e 100%); }
.sp-girl-smile { background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #ff9a9e 0%, #fecfef 100%); border-radius: 140px 140px 0 0; }
.sp-girl-sad   { background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #a18cd1 0%, #fbc2eb 100%); border-radius: 140px 140px 0 0; }

.SEMP-ROOT {
  --cf-cream: #f5ede0; --cf-latte: #e8d5b7; --cf-mocha: #c4956a;
  --cf-espresso: #6b3f1e; --cf-dark: #2c1a0e; --cf-steam: rgba(245,237,224,.08);
  --cf-panel: rgba(28,16,6,.80); --cf-border: rgba(196,149,106,.30);
  --cf-text: #f0e6d3; --cf-text-dim: #a8845e; --cf-name: #e8c490; --cf-radius: 6px;
  
  /* ⬇️ 零边距贴合方案 ⬇️ */
  position: relative; 
  width: 100%;               /* 宽度拉满 100%，实现零边距贴合 */
  max-width: 420px;          /* 电脑端上限锁定 */
  height: 65vh;           
  min-height: 480px;      
  max-height: 720px;      
  margin: 10px 0;            /* 只有上下边距，左右完全贴合气泡边缘 */
  border-radius: 6px;        /* 稍微减小圆角，让贴合感更自然 */
  box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); 
  box-sizing: border-box;    /* 核心属性：确保不会溢出 */
  /* ⬆️ 设定结束 ⬆️ */

  display: flex; flex-direction: column;
  overflow: hidden; background: #1a0d05; font-family: 'Noto Serif SC',serif;
  -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; touch-action: manipulation;
}

/* 装饰层 */
.galcafe-bg { position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 0; }
.galcafe-bg-img { position: absolute; inset: 0; background-size: cover; background-position: center top; transition: opacity .8s ease; opacity: 1; width: 100%; }
.galcafe-bg-img::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(18,8,2,.12) 0%, rgba(18,8,2,.04) 35%, rgba(18,8,2,.52) 72%, rgba(18,8,2,.84) 100%); }
.galcafe-bg-grad { position: absolute; inset: 0; opacity: 0; transition: opacity .8s ease; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 70%, rgba(140,70,22,.55) 0%, transparent 52%), linear-gradient(155deg, #1e1005 0%, #2e1c0a 100%); width: 100%; }
.galcafe-steam { position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 1; pointer-events: none; overflow: hidden; width: 100%; }
.cf-steam-puff { position: absolute; bottom: 28%; width: 2px; height: 28px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--cf-steam); filter: blur(3px); animation: cf-steam-rise var(--sd) ease-in infinite; animation-delay: var(--sdelay); left: var(--sleft); }
@keyframes cf-steam-rise { 0% { transform: translateY(0) scaleX(1); opacity: 0; } 15% { opacity: .5; } 60% { transform: translateY(-60px) scaleX(2.5); opacity: .2; } 100% { transform: translateY(-110px) scaleX(4); opacity: 0; } }

/* 立绘层 */
.galcafe-char { position: absolute; bottom: 82px; left: 0; right: 0; height: 0; z-index: 10; pointer-events: none; width: 100%; }
.cf-sprite { position: absolute; bottom: -150px; width: 280px; height: 600px; transform: translateX(-50%); transform-origin: bottom center; transition: filter .4s ease, opacity .4s ease, transform .4s ease; pointer-events: none; overflow: hidden; flex-shrink: 0; }
.cf-sprite.cf-active { filter: brightness(1); }
.cf-sprite.cf-dim { filter: brightness(.45) saturate(.35); }
.cf-sprite-img { position: absolute; inset: 0; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-position: center top; background-size: cover; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 5px rgba(20,10,0,.5)); opacity: .995; }
.cf-sprite-glow { position: absolute; left: -20px; right: -20px; bottom: -4px; height: 120px; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 100%, var(--sg, rgba(220,170,100,.18)) 0%, transparent 70%); pointer-events: none; animation: cf-glow-pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
@keyframes cf-glow-pulse { 0%,100% {opacity: .7} 50% {opacity: 1} }
@keyframes cf-sprite-in { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(14px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0); } }
.cf-sprite.cf-enter { animation: cf-sprite-in .45s ease forwards; }

/* 对话框层 */
.galcafe-dlg { position: relative; z-index: 100; width: 94%; margin: 0 auto 12px; cursor: pointer; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; }
.cf-dlg-frame { 
  background: var(--cf-panel); border: 1px solid var(--cf-border); border-radius: var(--cf-radius); 
  padding: 16px 18px 20px; backdrop-filter: blur(22px) saturate(1.4); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(22px) saturate(1.4); 
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(196,149,106,.06), 0 4px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.82), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(245,237,224,.07); 
  position: relative; overflow: hidden; min-height: 100px; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; 
}
.cf-dlg-frame::before { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -18px; right: -18px; width: 80px; height: 80px; border: 1px solid rgba(196,149,106,.1); border-radius: 50%; }
.cf-speaker { font-family: 'Ma Shan Zheng',cursive; font-size: 17px; color: var(--cf-name); letter-spacing: 4px; margin-bottom: 8px; min-height: 22px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; text-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(232,196,144,.5); width: 100%; }
.cf-speaker:not(:empty)::after { content: ''; flex: 1; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--cf-border), transparent); }
.cf-text { font-size: clamp(14px, 4vw, 17px); line-height: 1.85; color: var(--cf-text); letter-spacing: 1px; min-height: 60px; word-break: break-all; width: 100%; }
.cf-arrow { position: absolute; bottom: 10px; right: 14px; width: 22px; height: 22px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; opacity: 0; }
.cf-arrow.cf-vis { opacity: 1; animation: cf-bounce 1.1s ease-in-out infinite; }

/* 控制栏 */
.galcafe-ctrl { position: relative; z-index: 100; width: 94%; margin: 0 auto 14px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 4px; }
.cf-btn-group { display: flex; gap: 4px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.cf-btn { background: rgba(22,11,3,.74); border: 1px solid var(--cf-border); color: var(--cf-text-dim); font-family: 'Noto Serif SC',serif; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 1px; padding: 6px 8px; border-radius: 3px; cursor: pointer; transition: all .18s; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1; }
.cf-btn:active { background: rgba(196,149,106,.2); color: var(--cf-name); }
.cf-prog-wrap { flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; max-width: 90px; min-width: 60px; }
.cf-prog-bg { flex: 1; height: 2px; background: rgba(196,149,106,.15); border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden; }
.cf-prog-fill { height: 100%; width: 0%; background: var(--cf-mocha); border-radius: 2px; transition: width .4s ease; }
.cf-prog-label { font-size: 9px; color: var(--cf-text-dim); white-space: nowrap; }

/* 菜单/历史层 */
.galcafe-hist, .galcafe-menu { position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 500; display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: rgba(12,6,1,.95); backdrop-filter: blur(18px); opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; transition: opacity .25s ease; border-radius: 6px; width: 100%; }
.cf-open { opacity: 1 !important; pointer-events: all !important; }
.cf-hist-head { padding: 16px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--cf-border); display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; flex-shrink: 0; }
.cf-hist-head h2 { font-size: 14px; color: var(--cf-name); margin:0; font-style: italic; }
.cf-hist-list { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 14px 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; }
.cf-hist-entry { display: flex; gap: 10px; }
.cf-hist-spk { font-size: 12px; color: var(--cf-name); min-width: 45px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.cf-hist-txt { font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.6; color: rgba(240,230,210,.7); }
.cf-menu-panel { text-align: center; padding: 40px 30px; border: 1px solid var(--cf-border); border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(20,10,3,.92); width: 80%; margin: auto; }
.cf-menu-panel h1 { font-size: 18px; color: var(--cf-mocha); margin: 0 0 5px; }
.cf-menu-sub { font-size: 11px; color: var(--cf-text-dim); margin-bottom: 30px; }
.cf-menu-btn { display: block; width: 100%; margin-bottom: 10px; padding: 10px; background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--cf-border); color: var(--cf-text); font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 4px; }

.cf-auto-ind { position: absolute; top: 10px; right: 10px; z-index: 200; font-size: 9px; color: var(--cf-mocha); padding: 3px 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(196,149,106,.3); background: rgba(0,0,0,0.6); border-radius: 2px; opacity: 0; }
.cf-auto-ind.cf-on { opacity: 1; animation: cf-auto-pulse 1.5s infinite; }
@keyframes cf-auto-pulse { 0%,100% {opacity: 1} 50% {opacity: .4} }
.cf-flash { position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 999; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; border-radius: 6px; }
.cf-flash.cf-on { opacity: 1; }

@media (max-height:640px) { .galcafe-char { bottom: 75px; } .cf-sprite { bottom: -180px; } .cf-dlg-frame { padding: 12px 15px; min-height: 90px; } }
</style>
